summary: VenuLock Landing Page Hero Section Overhaul Testing - All features verified working. Brighter hero backdrop (opacity 0.35), glass-morphism search card (bg-white/85 backdrop-blur-xl), venue showcase strip with auto-scroll, gold gradient CTA button with glow animation, and animated headline ('You Celebrate.' typeReveal) all functioning correctly on desktop and mobile.

issues: Known issue from previous iteration: React hydration warning for tr/tbody nesting (span cannot be child of tbody). Functional but may cause SSR issues.

desktop_hero_section.details: Hero section loads with background image visible (opacity 0.35), headline 'We Negotiate. You Celebrate.' renders correctly

mobile_hero_section.details: All hero elements (headline, search card, CTA) visible above/near fold on mobile (390x844)

glass_morphism_search_card.details: Search card has bg-white/85 backdrop-blur-xl styling - glass effect visible on both desktop and mobile

city_near_me_toggle.details: Toggle works - switches between City and Near Me modes correctly on both viewports

city_dropdown.details: City dropdown opens with 12 city options, selection works (tested Delhi, Mumbai)

gold_gradient_cta_button.details: CTA button has cta-gold-gradient class with gradient and glow animation, navigates to /venues/search

venue_showcase_strip.details: Venue showcase strip renders with thumbnail images and venue-showcase-track auto-scroll animation

animated_headline.details: 'You Celebrate.' has hero-celebrate class with typeReveal animation, gold text styling

trust_badges_section.details: 4 trust badges visible: Verified Venues, Transparent Pricing, Smart Comparison, Booking Assistance

mobile_menu.details: Mobile hamburger menu opens/closes, Browse Venues and List Your Venue links present

admin_login.details: admin@venulock.in / admin123 -> redirects to /admin/dashboard (Operations Control Center)

rm_login.details: rm1@venulock.in / rm123 -> redirects to /rm/dashboard (Relationship Manager Console)

critical_code_review_comments: Hero section CSS animations (venue-scroll, typeReveal, cta-glow) are well-implemented in inline <style> block
Glass-morphism effect using backdrop-blur-xl provides elegant translucent effect
Pre-existing: RMDashboard has React hydration warning for invalid tbody/span nesting - consider fixing for SSR
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero section overhaul complete and verified. New features: (1) Hero backdrop opacity 0.35 for brighter image, (2) Glass-morphism search card with backdrop-blur, (3) Auto-scrolling venue showcase strip below hero, (4) Gold gradient CTA with glow animation, (5) TypeReveal animation on 'You Celebrate.' headline. All login flows (Admin/RM/Customer) working. Known issue: RMDashboard hydration warning for tbody/span nesting.
